response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Google — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His extensive open-source contributions and architectural breadth demonstrate deep engineering craftsmanship. However, his resume contains inconsistencies (e.g., current role at Google starting in 2025, conflicting employment overlaps) and lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java, raising minor concerns about precision and stack alignment.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS in high-scale environments (Google, Meta)
Demonstrated AI-agent and developer tooling experience at Google, directly matching a key requirement
Strong open-source contributions and architectural versatility across languages and platforms
concerns: Resume contains implausible employment dates (e.g., Google role starting in 2025, overlapping roles)
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key technologies listed in job description
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' in a Berlin-based enterprise role requiring strong collaboration

key_factors.factor: Inconsistent employment dates and missing key stack keywords
